features: QA-tested v3.0.63 Report Archive package after upload
Fixed stale server startup console label that still printed v3.0.7
Server startup label now reads from VERSION.txt/package metadata so future builds stay aligned
Confirmed JavaScript syntax checks passed for build.cjs, server.cjs, supabase-client.js, config.js, and script.js
Confirmed npm build succeeds and copies the consolidated 14-file package to dist/
Confirmed Report Archive renders with sample admin data and counts included proof media correctly
Confirmed all Admin, Guard, and Client nav views render without runtime errors in sandbox smoke test
Preserved v3.0.63 Report Archive Command Center features and v3.0.62 guardDisplayName fix
